---
title: "Peak_Notch_Table"
author: "Sarah Moseley"
date: "2026-05-11"
output: html_document
---

## Setup

```{r setup_load_peak_notch_features}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Packages
# ------------------------------------------------------------

required_packages <- c(
  "dplyr",
  "tidyr",
  "readr",
  "tibble",
  "gt"
)

missing_packages <- required_packages[
  !sapply(required_packages, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)
]

if (length(missing_packages) > 0) {
  install.packages(missing_packages)
}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(tibble)
library(gt)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Input file: already-picked peaks/notches from cluster mean spectra
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cluster_features_file <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/18PC/18PC_scaledICI_1/Peak_Notch_Boxplots_With_Soldevilla/tables/cluster_mean_peak_notch_features_for_point_plot.csv"

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Output folder
# ------------------------------------------------------------

base_output_dir <- "E:/Analysis/PCA_ICI_UMAP_HDBSCAN/18PC/18PC_scaledICI_1/Peak_Notch_Summary_Tables"

table_dir <- file.path(base_output_dir, "tables")

dir.create(table_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Load peak/notch features
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cluster_mean_features <- read_csv(
  cluster_features_file,
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    HDBSCAN_cluster = as.character(HDBSCAN_cluster),
    feature_type = as.character(feature_type),
    feature_label = as.character(feature_label)
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Remove noise cluster 0
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cluster_mean_features_no_noise <- cluster_mean_features %>%
  filter(HDBSCAN_cluster != "0")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Sanity checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cat("Original rows:", nrow(cluster_mean_features), "\n")
cat("Rows after removing noise cluster 0:", nrow(cluster_mean_features_no_noise), "\n\n")

cat("Clusters retained:\n")
print(sort(unique(cluster_mean_features_no_noise$HDBSCAN_cluster)))

cat("\nFeature counts after removing noise:\n")
print(
  cluster_mean_features_no_noise %>%
    count(feature_type, feature_label)
)

cat("\nPreview:\n")
print(cluster_mean_features_no_noise, n = Inf)

```

## Build Summary Statistics

```{r build_summary_statistics}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Soldevilla reference values from Table IV
# ------------------------------------------------------------

soldevilla_reference <- tibble(
  Region = rep(c("PPac", "CC"), each = 7),
  
  feature_label = rep(
    c(
      "Peak 1", "Peak 2", "Peak 3", "Peak 4",
      "Notch 1", "Notch 2", "Notch 3"
    ),
    times = 2
  ),
  
  mean_frequency_khz = c(
    
    # PPac
    23.5, 26.6, 31.7, 36.0,
    25.4, 28.7, 33.5,
    
    # CC
    21.8, 24.8, 31.2, 37.9,
    23.4, 27.0, 34.5
  ),
  
  sd_frequency_khz = c(
    
    # PPac
    0.9, 1.5, 0.6, 2.1,
    0.9, 1.2, 0.8,
    
    # CC
    1.0, 1.0, 1.0, 2.3,
    1.2, 0.9, 1.3
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    summary_value = sprintf(
      "%.1f ± %.1f",
      mean_frequency_khz,
      sd_frequency_khz
    )
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Our data summary statistics
# Mean ± SD across clusters 1-9
# ------------------------------------------------------------

our_data_summary <- cluster_mean_features_no_noise %>%
  
  group_by(
    feature_type,
    feature_rank,
    feature_label
  ) %>%
  
  summarise(
    mean_frequency_khz = mean(Frequency_kHz, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_frequency_khz = sd(Frequency_kHz, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_clusters = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  
  mutate(
    Region = "Our Data",
    
    summary_value = sprintf(
      "%.1f ± %.1f",
      mean_frequency_khz,
      sd_frequency_khz
    )
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Sanity checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cat("Soldevilla reference table:\n\n")
print(soldevilla_reference)

cat("\n\nOur data summary statistics:\n\n")
print(our_data_summary)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save summaries
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write_csv(
  soldevilla_reference,
  file.path(
    table_dir,
    "soldevilla_reference_values.csv"
  )
)

write_csv(
  our_data_summary,
  file.path(
    table_dir,
    "our_cluster_summary_statistics.csv"
  )
)

cat("\nDONE: Summary statistics generated and saved.\n")

```

## Build Table

```{r build_peak_table_dataframe}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Keep only peak rows
# ------------------------------------------------------------

peak_soldevilla <- soldevilla_reference %>%
  filter(grepl("Peak", feature_label))

peak_our_data <- our_data_summary %>%
  filter(feature_type == "Peak")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Combine into one long table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

peak_combined <- bind_rows(
  
  peak_soldevilla %>%
    select(
      feature_label,
      Region,
      summary_value
    ),
  
  peak_our_data %>%
    select(
      feature_label,
      Region,
      summary_value
    )
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Convert to wide table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

peak_summary_table <- peak_combined %>%
  
  mutate(
    feature_label = factor(
      feature_label,
      levels = c(
        "Peak 1",
        "Peak 2",
        "Peak 3",
        "Peak 4"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  
  arrange(feature_label) %>%
  
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Region,
    values_from = summary_value
  ) %>%
  
  rename(
    `Feature` = feature_label
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Preview
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cat("Peak summary table:\n\n")

print(peak_summary_table)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save CSV
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write_csv(
  peak_summary_table,
  file.path(
    table_dir,
    "peak_summary_table.csv"
  )
)

cat("\nDONE: Peak summary table dataframe created.\n")

```

## Notch Data Frame

```{r build_notch_table_dataframe}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Keep only notch rows
# ------------------------------------------------------------

notch_soldevilla <- soldevilla_reference %>%
  filter(grepl("Notch", feature_label))

notch_our_data <- our_data_summary %>%
  filter(feature_type == "Notch")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Combine into one long table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

notch_combined <- bind_rows(
  
  notch_soldevilla %>%
    select(
      feature_label,
      Region,
      summary_value
    ),
  
  notch_our_data %>%
    select(
      feature_label,
      Region,
      summary_value
    )
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Convert to wide table
# ------------------------------------------------------------

notch_summary_table <- notch_combined %>%
  
  mutate(
    feature_label = factor(
      feature_label,
      levels = c(
        "Notch 1",
        "Notch 2",
        "Notch 3"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  
  arrange(feature_label) %>%
  
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Region,
    values_from = summary_value
  ) %>%
  
  rename(
    `Feature` = feature_label
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Preview
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cat("Notch summary table:\n\n")

print(notch_summary_table)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save CSV
# ------------------------------------------------------------

write_csv(
  notch_summary_table,
  file.path(
    table_dir,
    "notch_summary_table.csv"
  )
)

cat("\nDONE: Notch summary table dataframe created.\n")

```

## Format and Save

```{r format_and_export_tables}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper function for clean publication-style tables
# ------------------------------------------------------------

make_clean_table <- function(
    input_table,
    title_text
) {
  
  input_table %>%
    
    gt() %>%
    
    tab_header(
      title = md(title_text)
    ) %>%
    
    cols_align(
      align = "center",
      columns = everything()
    ) %>%
    
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
    ) %>%
    
    tab_options(
      
      table.font.names = "Times New Roman",
      
      table.font.size = px(13),
      
      heading.title.font.size = px(13),
      heading.title.font.weight = "normal",
      
      column_labels.font.size = px(13),
      
      data_row.padding = px(4),
      
      table.border.top.width = px(1),
      table.border.bottom.width = px(1),
      
      column_labels.border.top.width = px(1),
      column_labels.border.bottom.width = px(1),
      
      table_body.hlines.width = px(0.5)
    )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Create formatted tables
# ------------------------------------------------------------

peak_gt_table <- make_clean_table(
  peak_summary_table,
  "Summary statistics (mean ± SD) for spectral peak frequencies (kHz)."
)

notch_gt_table <- make_clean_table(
  notch_summary_table,
  "Summary statistics (mean ± SD) for spectral notch frequencies (kHz)."
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Display tables
# ------------------------------------------------------------

peak_gt_table
notch_gt_table

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save HTML versions
# ------------------------------------------------------------

gtsave(
  peak_gt_table,
  file.path(
    table_dir,
    "peak_summary_table.html"
  )
)

gtsave(
  notch_gt_table,
  file.path(
    table_dir,
    "notch_summary_table.html"
  )
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save PNG versions
# ------------------------------------------------------------

gtsave(
  peak_gt_table,
  file.path(
    table_dir,
    "peak_summary_table.png"
  )
)

gtsave(
  notch_gt_table,
  file.path(
    table_dir,
    "notch_summary_table.png"
  )
)

cat("\nDONE: Styled tables exported.\n")

```
